Description: Unique primary key for each district-month observation
Unique ID code of the district (D_001 to D_100)
State to which the district belongs (State_A to State_E)
Geographical region (North, Central, East, South, West)
Latitude coordinate of the district centroid
Longitude coordinate of the district centroid
Calendar year of the observation (2015 to 2025)
Calendar month of the observation (1 to 12)
First date of the district-month (YYYY-MM-01)
The type of disaster that occurred (Flood, Cyclone, etc., or No Disaster)
Binary flag: 1 if a disaster occurred, 0 otherwise
Duration of the disaster event in days
Physical magnitude of the hazard event
Relative severity score of the hazard (1 to 10)
Monthly raw rainfall in millimetres for the observation month
Binary flag: 1 if two or more hazard types activated simultaneously in this district-month, 0 otherwise
Normalized rainfall deviation from the monthly baseline
Mean temperature in Celsius
Temperature deviation from the monthly seasonal baseline
Mean wind speed in kilometers per hour
Mean height of local rivers in meters
Normalized soil moisture content (0 to 1)
Index of agricultural dryness (0 to 100)
Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) (0.1 to 0.9)
District elevation in meters above sea level
Average slope angle of district terrain in degrees
Shortest distance to the coastline in kilometers
Shortest distance to the major river in kilometers
Index representing seismological activity levels
Total population of the district
Custom feature engineered column
Population per square kilometer
Percentage of population living in urban areas
Estimated total households in the district
Index of infrastructure development density
Percentage of land area dedicated to agriculture
Percentage of land area dedicated to industry
Percentage of population living below the poverty line
Percentage of population aged 65 or above
Percentage of population aged 14 or below
Percentage of literate population
Composite index of housing structural integrity (0-100)
Composite index of healthcare accessibility (0-100)
Composite index of road infrastructure quality (0-100)
Composite index of telecommunications access (0-100)
Raw count of operational emergency shelters
Raw count of general hospitals
Raw count of disaster rescue teams
Binary flag: 1 if operational, 0 otherwise
Binary flag: 1 if detailed plan exists, 0 otherwise
Average emergency service response time in minutes
Composite preparedness score (10 to 100)
Response rating score of local authorities (30 to 100)
Total fatalities caused by the disaster event
Total injuries caused by the disaster event
Total people requiring immediate relief or shelter
Total individuals displaced from their homes
Total residential houses damaged or destroyed
Score representing damage to roads/power (0-100)
Percentage of agricultural crop loss
Estimated economic loss in USD Millions
